meta.title: DeepLearning.AI NLP Learner Community Event ft. Luis Alaniz
meta.description:
deeplearning.ai presents virtual mini-event series for our Learner Community of those taking our courses. This one is designed for NLP learners!

#MeetYourMentor: Mentors sharing their personal experiences of breaking into AI
#DeepDive: A deep dive into a specific area that the guest speaker is working on
and more!

This event will be at 10am PDT on June 30th featuring one of our NLP mentors Luis Alaniz. Previously the Director at FUNIDES, a think tank in Nicaragua, Luis is a senior economist with an experience of working in public policy.

 
Check out all our courses: https://bit.ly/39yz95P
